summary: Iteration 5 (Feb 6 2026) regression test for TURN fallback + Push-to-Talk + .jsx → .tsx migration. Backend regression_shield + vibe_room_signaling = 62 PASSED (was 60, +2 new locks confirmed). Frontend smoke on mobile 390x844 confirms PTT button + spacebar hotkey + mic disable + typing-guard all functional. Three random shadcn-importing pages (/games, /vibe-vault-admin, /spades) compile and render with 0 'Module not found' errors. Zero .jsx files remain in /app/frontend/src.
critical_code_review_comments: VibeRoomVoice.tsx now 745 lines — approaching 700-line guideline. Consider splitting WebRTC peer-connection logic, PTT hooks, and presentation layout into separate files in a future refactor.
DEFAULT_ICE_SERVERS IIFE is clean and correctly switches private TURN (REACT_APP_TURN_URL/USER/PASS) over OpenRelay public fallback. iceServers prop default wires through.
PTT spacebar listener correctly e.preventDefault()s, gates on e.repeat (no key-repeat retrigger), and skips INPUT/TEXTAREA/SELECT/contentEditable targets. Cleanup unsets pttPressed on unmount.
Mic button correctly disabled (HTML disabled + opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed) when pushToTalk active.
PTT button glow (emerald shadow) bound to pttPressed state — visual feedback verified in DOM.
test_credentials: POST /api/auth/demo-login (no body) — used during browser tests; cookie session established.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 vibe654 tournament table id=4235a350-530b-4b86-b48e-eb7fea0d82d9 ('Test PTT', host=demo_23970ac9, buy_in=100) for live coliseum render. Status WAITING; can be left to age out or cleaned via admin.
